typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: VAL-EXEC-001 remains incomplete: `testVAL_EXEC_001_RunPhaseToPacketStatusMappingIsDeterministic` still validates only `.completed`, without explicit failed/cancelled terminal phase→packet status mapping assertions.
Explicit VAL-EXEC-003 assertion-tagged provenance coverage is still missing; provenance assertions remain in untagged test coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align validation command examples with `.factory/services.yaml` canonical `BurnBar*` filters and require evidence capture for each listed focused validator to reduce rerun drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-2 fix review again found command/evidence drift (`OpenBurnBar*` guidance in skill vs `BurnBar*` canonical commands), while rerun evidence still missed required VAL-EXEC-001 and VAL-EXEC-003 tagging requirements.
